unsupportedExecutions.message: node-webgpu execution unavailable for provider node-webgpu on this Apple host
unsupportedExecutions.detail: Gemma64 prefill+decode on Apple Node/node-webgpu crashes in queue.onSubmittedWorkDone() during the attention-decode dispatch window on mac.lan. Root cause is the same Dawn Metal backend accumulation failure as decode_1tok: repeated large weight buffer (9MB) writes between dispatches exhaust a Metal resource. Confirmed on webgpu@0.3.8 and @0.4.0. Bun/bun-webgpu is unaffected.

unsupportedExecutions.message: node-webgpu execution unavailable for provider node-webgpu on this Apple host
unsupportedExecutions.detail: Gemma64 decode-1tok on Apple Node/node-webgpu crashes in queue.onSubmittedWorkDone() after the 3rd consecutive matmul-gemv dispatch on mac.lan. Root cause is a Dawn Metal backend accumulation failure with repeated large weight buffer (9MB) writes between dispatches. Confirmed on webgpu@0.3.8 and @0.4.0. Bun/bun-webgpu is unaffected.

unsupportedExecutions.message: node-webgpu execution unavailable for provider node-webgpu on this Apple host
unsupportedExecutions.detail: Gemma1B prefill+decode on Apple Node/node-webgpu crashes in queue.onSubmittedWorkDone() on mac.lan. Same Dawn Metal backend accumulation failure as gemma64: repeated large weight buffer writes between dispatches. Confirmed on webgpu@0.3.8 and @0.4.0. Bun/bun-webgpu is unaffected.
